scenarios.title: Massive swing in NJ-2 Democratic nominee
scenarios.fact: The Democratic nominee for NJ-2 was looking very certain to be John Kavanaugh. Massive swing today toward Denise Powell. Nigel was positioned for Kavanaugh and is now on the wrong side of a sudden move.

scenarios.title: Eurovision semi-finals — 3 picks right, 1 wrong (Poland)
scenarios.fact: Nigel called Georgia, Estonia, and Montenegro — all qualified. Poland didn't qualify. Process was sound on all four picks; outcome went against him on Poland. The 'wrong is different to process' commentary opportunity.

scenarios.title: Weekly wrap-up: 100+ positions, slightly below target
scenarios.fact: Nigel took over 100 positions this week. Results came in slightly below target. Confident to go again next week.

tempi.name: materialistic
tempi.feel: Strong/Quick — sudden aggressive intent, sharp declarative

tempi.name: unacknowledged
tempi.feel: Quick/Bound — self-concealed aggression, 'we told you so'

tempi.name: acute
tempi.feel: Direct/Quick — acute idea-decision, sharp insight cut

tempi.name: uncertain
tempi.feel: Flexible/Quick — sudden new idea, what-if framing

Q1:
The old dude that lives in the pub. Newspapers next to him, a phone he places bets with.
Dispassionate. Used to be laughed at for being wrong; now he doesn't care — has been proved right
so many times the past humiliation no longer stings. The rock in the middle of other people's
river: settled, immovable, water flows around him. Old-school analog tools. Pub-fixture register —
British, dry, vernacular, doesn't argue.
